title: erysimum angustifolium
intro: Erysimum angustifolium, also known as Western wallflower, is a flowering plant species native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and potentially aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. Erysimum angustifolium can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
